name: friction tracker aggregates inline suppression events to per-rule totals consumable by space collector
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/friction && for r in no-eval no-eval no-eval no-console; do bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/friction-tracker.sh" --event inline-suppression --rule-id "$r" --at 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>/dev/null; done && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/friction-tracker.sh" --aggregate --by rule-id --since 1d 2>out.txt && grep -q 'no-eval=3' out.txt && grep -q 'no-console=1' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
